headline: 4 Low-Beta Defensive Stocks to Buy as Geopolitical Tensions Escalate
summary: FE, AEE, KO and NYT stand out as low-beta defensive stocks as renewed U.S.-Iran tensions, higher oil prices and market volatility raise demand for stability.
